ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "asin" TEXT /* Amazon Standard Identification Number for the product */,
  "overall" INTEGER /* Overall rating given by the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review provided by the user */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis results in JSON format */,
  "compound_score" REAL /* Compound sentiment score calculated from the review */,
  "new_score" REAL /* New score calculated based on the review content */,
  "useful_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating how useful the review is as rated by other users */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title or summary of the review */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the languages table to indicate the language of the review */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review is posted anonymously */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review is featured by the platform */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the reviewer for security and fraud detection */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the reviewer's device for analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_asin FOREIGN KEY ("asin") REFERENCES products ("asin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "asin" TEXT /* Amazon Standard Identification Number for the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category under which the product is listed */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in stock */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "product_url" TEXT /* URL to the product page on the e-commerce website */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product is currently active and available for sale */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product based on all reviews */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the reviewer joined the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the reviewer */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the reviewer's profile picture */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews posted by the reviewer */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the reviewer across all reviews */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the reviewer is verified by the platform */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis record */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review being analyzed */,
  "negative_score" REAL /* Score indicating the negative sentiment proportion */,
  "neutral_score" REAL /* Score indicating the neutral sentiment proportion */,
  "positive_score" REAL /* Score indicating the positive sentiment proportion */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Label for the overall sentiment (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "useful_scores" (
  "useful_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each useful score record */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review being rated for usefulness */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the usefulness */,
  "vote" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user found the review helpful (true/false) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date when the user rated the usefulness of the review */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who rated the review */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("useful_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_useful_scores_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the categories table to indicate the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is active */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the category icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., review, rating, purchase) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity (e.g., review text, product ID) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the report in JSON format */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Summary, Detailed) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Published) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the report is public or private */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the admin_users table to indicate the admin who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES admin_users ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the admin user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the admin user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin user (e.g., Admin, Super Admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the admin user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language (e.g., English, Spanish) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the language is currently active for use */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Locale code for the language (e.g., en_US, es_ES) */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Text direction (e.g., LTR, RTL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)
